title: Kalevala: Lemminkainen on the Island of Women
description: The reckless hero Lemminkainen sails to the Island of Women and stays for three years of pleasure — the Finnish equivalent of Circe's island.
introduction: The reckless hero Lemminkainen sails to the Island of Women and stays for three years of pleasure — the Finnish equivalent of Circe's island.

translation.text: Lemminkainen sailed to the island where the women lived without men. He stayed for three years. Every woman loved him. But at last he remembered his home.
